field.label: region_name
field.help: Enter your OpenStack Designate region_name here. https://github.com/caddy-dns/openstack-designate

field.label: tenant_id
field.help: Enter your OpenStack Designate tenant_id here.

field.label: identity_api_version
field.help: Enter your OpenStack Designate identity_api_version here.

field.label: password
field.help: Enter your OpenStack Designate password here.

field.label: username
field.help: Enter your OpenStack Designate username here.

field.label: tenant_name
field.help: Enter your OpenStack Designate tenant_name here.

field.label: auth_url
field.help: Enter your OpenStack Designate auth_url here.

field.label: endpoint_type
field.help: Enter your OpenStack Designate endpoint_type here.
